reviews.review_msg: This professor has no respect to his students and don't expect to get any help from him. He cares more about defending himself than helping you to learn. If he says anything terrible to you, don't take it personally and don't let it bother you. He might have a PhD but he certainly didn't receive any education on how he should respect his students.

He's a very knowledgeable guy. Comes off as somewhat disdainful towards students but maybe that's because he gets so many stupid questions from people who weren't listening. Anyways, it was nice to do a video project. Learned a lot in this class although it was challenging to grasp  concepts sometimes.
Roy is an awesome pro I have ever had in SFU! He is funny and passionate in the course! He doesn't make the lecture too stressful! He is helpful and really nice guy!

AWESOME prof, lectures are absolutely interesting, he's not the type to read off a slide and he uses good videos and pictures to enhance his lecture :) I don't know how he marks, but theres no midterm or final, just a movie project: Awesome x2! BTW I think he deserves a chili pepper ;)

If you take the time to talk to him and really understand what the assignment is about, he is not a hard marker.  He's actually a really great guy and is very helpful with questions and assignments.  Excellent at leading meaningful discussions.

Roy is an extremely hard marker - I had him as a TA. That's the only con to having him. He is a very good TA, though. Very willing to give help and spend extra time one-on-one. He made the material interesting and encouraged alot of great discussions.
I had him for TA and Prof. He is extremely a hard marker. Warning  low marks for everything! But his teaching is really clear and easily understanding.

Super picky and if you are not a good writer. Don't even bother with this course because it will become your next tomb and he is insanely picky about those little nitty technicality or the controversial issues. And he marks your essay based on his oppnion and he even made a marking mistake before and yet reluctent to change the grade.

What can I say really? Very picky about the writing assignments to the smallest details that are very controversial. Extremely hard marker, almost impossible to get good marks. Attidue is pretty good, but that's probably a deception from marking insanely hard.
